---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What's the use case?

(What are you trying to do that the Console doesn't help with yet?)

## What would the feature look like?

(UI sketch, command-line example, API stub — whatever makes sense for the feature.)

## Does it fit the project's scope?

The Console explicitly **does not** want to add:

- "Fortune-telling" / "oracle" / "算命" framing
- Required external API integrations
- Biometric features (face recognition, demographic attribution)
- Multi-camera identity reconciliation
- Single-vendor LLM lock-in
- Automated trading / money movement / legal-advice-without-human-in-loop

If your feature is in any of those areas, the request will probably be politely declined. If it's adjacent but you think it fits, please make the case in the description.

## Anything else?

(Prior art, related papers, alternative approaches you've considered.)
